heading: Notification of persons injured by circumvention devices
label: 4342 Notification of persons injured by circumvention devices

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than the date that is 30 business days after seizing merchandise pursuant to subparagraph (G) of , the Commissioner shall provide to any person identified under paragraph (2) information regarding the merchandise seized that is equivalent to information provided to copyright owners under regulations of U.S. Customs and Border Protection for merchandise seized for violation of the copyright laws.section 1595a(c)(2) of this title

children.heading: Persons to be provided information
children.label: 2 Persons to be provided information
children.text: Any person injured by the violation of subsection (a)(2) or (b)(1) of that resulted in the seizure of the merchandise shall be provided information under paragraph (1), if that person is included on a list to be established and maintained by the Commissioner. The Commissioner shall publish notice of the establishment of and revisions to the list in the Federal Register.section 1201 of title 17

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: 3 Regulations
children.text: Not later than the date that is one year after , the Secretary of the Treasury shall prescribe regulations establishing procedures that implement this section.February 24, 2016
